ENG-001.name: Global Oil Price Spike
ENG-001.description: Global crude oil prices rise sharply, increasing domestic fuel costs.

ENG-002.name: Global Oil Price Collapse
ENG-002.description: Oil prices fall significantly, requiring subsidy and pricing policy review.

ENG-003.name: Fuel Subsidy Stress
ENG-003.description: Fuel subsidy requirements exceed planned fiscal capacity.

ENG-004.name: High CPO Price
ENG-004.description: Palm oil prices increase, reducing biodiesel cost competitiveness.

ENG-005.name: Fuel Import Disruption
ENG-005.description: International fuel imports are delayed or disrupted.

ENG-006.name: Strategic Fuel Reserve Depletion
ENG-006.description: National strategic fuel reserves fall below operational thresholds.

ENG-007.name: Biodiesel Supply Disruption
ENG-007.description: Domestic biodiesel production or distribution is disrupted.

ENG-008.name: Domestic Fuel Demand Surge
ENG-008.description: Fuel demand rises suddenly due to economic activity or emergencies.
